subcodes.first_line: O Thou Whose name beginneth with H and S before 'Ayn! The Most Exalted Pen hath been moved to make mention of such souls who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حاء و السین قبل العین قد اصبح القلم الاعلی متحرکا علی ذکر الاولیاء الذین ما
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
